'''marate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrillionfold|quadrillionfold]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrillionfold|quadrillionfold]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| marate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || marate
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || maratesher
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || maratesherëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || maratero
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || marateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || marateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimaratero
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokimarateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimarateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gomarankerom
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomarankeshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomarankeshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gomarankeya
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || maraterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || maratemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || marateya
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimaraterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimaratemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokimarateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || mararate
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || mararatesher
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || mararatesherëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || mararatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || mararateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || mararateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimararatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokimararateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimararateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gomararankerom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomararankeshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomararankeshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gomararankeya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || mararaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || mararatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || mararateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimararaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimararatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokimararateya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || mæræte
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || mærætesher
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || mærætesherëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || mærætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || mæræteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || mæræteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimærætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokimæræteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimæræteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gomærænkerom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomærænkeshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomærænkeshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gomærænkeya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || mæræterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || mærætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || mæræteya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimæræterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimærætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokimæræteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || mafrafte
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || mafraftesher
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || mafraftesherëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || mafraftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || mafrafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || mafrafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimafraftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokimafrafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimafrafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gomafrafnkerom
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomafrafnkeshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomafrafnkeshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gomafrafnkeya
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || mafrafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || mafraftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || mafrafteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokimafrafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokimafraftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokimafrafteya
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
